default_steps.title: Diagnose the Main Revenue Bottleneck
default_steps.description: Review the shop's CTR, conversion rate, ROAS, revenue, and creative performance to identify the biggest weakness.
default_steps.action: Use the dashboard to identify whether the main issue is attention, conversion, creator fit, or profitability.
default_steps.expected_result: The seller understands which part of the ad funnel needs the most improvement.

default_steps.title: Improve the Video Hook
default_steps.description: Strengthen the first few seconds of the ad so viewers immediately understand the product problem, benefit, or transformation.
default_steps.action: Create a hook that shows the product immediately, calls out the target customer, or demonstrates a clear before-and-after.
default_steps.expected_result: Higher viewer retention and stronger click-through rate.

default_steps.title: Match the Best Creator Style
default_steps.description: Use creator comparison data to identify which creator type performs best for this shop.
default_steps.action: Prioritize the creator style with the strongest views, engagement, conversion, and revenue performance.
default_steps.expected_result: Better creative fit and improved ad performance.

default_steps.title: Generate a New Ad Brief
default_steps.description: Turn the diagnosis into a specific TikTok Shop ad concept with a hook, product demo, CTA, and creator direction.
default_steps.action: Use the ad brief generator to create 2-3 new ad variations based on the strongest pattern.
default_steps.expected_result: The seller has a clear creative plan for the next ad test.

default_steps.title: Launch Small Creative Tests
default_steps.description: Test multiple creative variations before scaling the winning version.
default_steps.action: Launch 3 short-form ad variations using different hooks, CTAs, or creator styles.
default_steps.expected_result: The seller can identify which creative direction performs best.

default_steps.title: Track Results and Repeat
default_steps.description: Compare the new ads against the previous baseline using CTR, conversion rate, ROAS, and revenue.
default_steps.action: Keep the strongest-performing element and replace the weakest element in the next test cycle.
default_steps.expected_result: Continuous improvement in ad performance and shop revenue.
